entity.summary: Balancer V3-powered decentralized exchange and liquidity hub on BNB Chain with live application access and current protocol liquidity.
entity.notes: The first-party roadmap places DEX launch in Q4 2025; HEI stores the quarter at October precision. The site and application remain live and protocol data reports current BNB Chain TVL.

evidence.title: Coinhain official website and roadmap
evidence.notes: First-party site presents the live application, BNB Chain liquidity products, and a roadmap placing DEX launch in Q4 2025.

evidence.title: Coinhain protocol profile and metrics
evidence.notes: Protocol profile identifies Coinhain as a BNB Chain weighted-pool AMM DEX and reports current TVL.
